mapper.select: SELECT draft_id, user_id, draft_key, diary_id, title, date, LEFT(content, 512) AS content, content_format, mood_key, tag_ids, updated_at FROM diary_draft WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT * FROM diary_draft WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND draft_key = #{draftKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diary_draft (user_id, draft_key, diary_id, title, date, content, content_format, mood_key, tag_ids) VALUES (#{userId}, #{draftKey}, #{diaryId}, #{title}, #{date}, #{content}, #{contentFormat}, #{moodKey}, #{tagIds}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE diary_id = VALUES(diary_id), title = VALUES(title), date = VALUES(date), content = VALUES(content), content_format = VALUES(content_format), mood_key = VALUES(mood_key), tag_ids = VALUES(tag_ids), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM diary_draft WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND draft_id = #{draftId}
DELETE FROM diary_draft WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND draft_key = #{draftKey}
